titleStmt.title: SII 23.486: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 486. (A.R. No. 486 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Uttaravēdīśvara temple—on the same wall Par. Rājēndradēva year 5: 1055-56 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with the short introduction mentioning the king's conquest of Iraṭṭapāḍi, planting of his pillar of victory at Kollāpuram and his anointment of victors having captured the elephants, horses, harem and treasury of the terrified Āhavamalla at Koppam. Portion at the end of the inscription is lost. It registers an endowment of 25 kāśu by a merchant of Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻapuram by name Veṇkāḍaṉ Āḍavallān, for feeding with the interest thereon some itinerant Śivayōgins after the daily midday service in the temple of Śoṉṉavāṟaṟivār at Vīṅgunīr-Tirutturutti in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu, a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The amount was deposited with the śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple. The gift is said to have been made to bring strength of arms to the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum koṇṭu kollāpurattu jaya stambham nāṭṭi perāṟṟaṅkarai koppat tāhavamallaṉai Añcuvit tavan
Āṉaiyuṅ kutiraiyum peṇṭirpaṇṭāramuṅ kaikkoṇṭu vijaiyabhiṣekam paṇṇi virasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakesaripanma
rāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājentradevaṟku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu viṅkunirt tirutturutti civa brāhmaṇan māṭilan ma
ticūtan cāttanum māṭilan Ātittan cāttanum Ikkuṭi coti coḻa pāṇṭiyaṉum Ikkuṭi Ainūṟṟeṇman piccaṉum Ikkuṭi tirukaraṇat tiruveḻvikkuṭiyum
kauśikan parameśvaran muvāyirabhaṭṭanum Ivvaṉaivom kaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻapurattu Uḷḷālaip periya Aṅkāṭi viyāpāri veṇkāṭan Āṭaval lān kaiyāl yāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭava Anṟāṭu naṟkācu Irupattaiñcu Ik kācu Irupattaiñcukkum kācu Onṟu
kku palicai nelluk kalaney nnāḻi Uḻakkāka Ikkācu Irupattaiñcuk kum Orāṭṭaikkup palicai nellu muppatin kalamum Innellu muppa tin kalamum koṇṭu Icconnavāṟṟivār koyil Uṭaiyār śrīrā jentratevar śrībhujaṅkaḷ va
rttikka Ucciyam potai santi [ deśānti] rikaḷāy vanta civay[ Ogikaḷu] kku Ivan vaitta caṭṭiccoṟu Onṟukkum Arici Iru nāḻikku nellaiñ ñāḻiyum kaṟi miḷaku poṭi Onṟukkum puḻukkukkaṟi Oṉṟukkum nellu nāḻi Uḻakkum viṟakukku nelluriyum caṭṭi yiṭu
ṅ kucavaṉukku nelluriyum Uppukku nel lāḻākkum pākku veṟṟilai Eṭṭukkum nelluri yāḻākkum Āka nāḷonṟukku nellu kuṟuṇiyum Āka Ikkācu Irupattaiñcukkum Ippalicai nellu muppatin kalat tālum Ic caṭṭiccoṟu Onṟum canti
rātittavaṟ cāśvatikamāka Iccaṭṭiccoṟu kuṭukka kaṭavomāka kalveṭṭu vittuk kuṭuttom Ikkoyil civa brāhmaṇarom Ikkāciley Iv vūrk kucavaṉ coti māṇikka veṭkovan va cai ceruttu cantrātit taval caṭṭi Iṭa kuṭutta kācu Oṉṟu IccaṭStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.486 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
